title: Where did the paste function go?
excerpt: I have many groups on our boards and setting up dependencies has always been time consuming and difficult, so when creating a new task I like to copy the dependency from another task and paste it into the new task. Recen…

posts.author: goldmandw (Dylan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have many groups on our boards and setting up dependencies has always been time consuming and difficult, so when creating a new task I like to copy the dependency from another task and paste it into the new task. Recently it appears that the ability to paste has disappeared from the options when I right click on a cell. See attached image. Can anyone shed light on this and tell me if this function will be coming back? Thanks.

image427×629 22 KB

posts.author: adibar (adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have the same issue!
Where did this basic function go?!

posts.author: Uncle_Sammys_Pantry (Dan Barnes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Me, too. You can still copy a cell, but then what?

What’s up monday.com?

posts.author: goldmandw (Dylan)
posts.cookedHtml: @monday-team can someone please let us now if you will be adding the paste function back to the right click menu? Thanks.
